description: Per-cycle facts introduced into memory. Each cycle adds one new fact. At cycle t, probe facts from cycles 0..t-1 to measure lag-based recall.

facts.text: Sprint review showed Module A passed 147 out of 150 integration tests with 98% coverage.
Performance benchmark: API endpoint /v2/analytics achieves p99 latency of 142ms under 500 concurrent users.
Security audit by Sofia Delacroix identified 3 critical vulnerabilities in the OAuth token refresh flow, all patched by March 5th.
Budget reallocation approved: $2,300 moved from contingency to Module B after vendor pricing increase from Acme Corp.
Dr. Elena Vasquez approved exception: temporary use of SQLite for offline sync feature, must migrate to PostgreSQL by milestone 4.
Load test results: system sustained 12,400 requests per second with mean response time of 23ms on the 4-node cluster.
Ravi Krishnaswamy configured blue-green deployment with automatic rollback if error rate exceeds 0.5% in the first 10 minutes.
Final compliance review confirmed 17 out of 19 regulatory controls are fully implemented; remaining 2 need documentation updates by July 1st.
